message:
test(notion): add comprehensive tests for database and block CRUD operations

Add mock-server client tests for get/create/update database and
get/update/delete block endpoints. Add connector-level missing-field
validation tests and risk-level introspection verification. Full
integration test suite covering all Notion operations. Update manifest
interface hash.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
